inline_comments: Classify outbound send errors for safe retries and actionable logs. Important: We only mark errors as retryable when we have an explicit HTTP status code that indicates the message was not accepted (e.g. 429, 5xx). For transport-level errors where delivery is ambiguous, we prefer to avoid retries to reduce the chance of duplicate posts.

Detect whether an error is caused by a revoked Proxy. The Bot Framework SDK wraps TurnContext in a Proxy that is revoked once the turn handler returns.  Any later access (e.g. from a debounced callback) throws a TypeError whose message contains the distinctive "proxy that has been revoked" string.
